papers.title: Scaling Monosemanticity: Extracting Interpretable Features from Claude 3 Sonnet
papers.titleCN: 扩展单语义性：从Claude 3 Sonnet中提取可解释特征
papers.abstract: We demonstrate the successful extraction of millions of features from the middle layer of Claude 3.0 Sonnet, a frontier large language model. These features are interpretable and correspond to a diverse range of concepts including famous people, countries, emotions, programming syntax, and abstract philosophical concepts.
papers.abstractCN: 我们成功从Claude 3.0 Sonnet（前沿大语言模型）的中间层提取了数百万个特征。这些特征具有可解释性，对应于多种概念，包括名人、国家、情绪、编程语法和抽象哲学概念。

papers.title: The Llama 3 Herd of Models
papers.abstract: We present Llama 3, a new generation of large language models that natively supports multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage. Our largest model is a dense Transformer with 405B parameters that operates on sequences of up to 128k tokens.
papers.abstractCN: 我们介绍了Llama 3，新一代大语言模型，原生支持多语言、编程、推理和工具使用。我们最大的模型是一个拥有4050亿参数的密集Transformer，可处理长达12.8万token的序列。

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Without Prompting
papers.titleCN: 无需提示的思维链推理
papers.abstract: Enabling chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in large language models typically requires manually crafting CoT prompts. We introduce a simple decoding strategy that elicits CoT reasoning from pre-trained LLMs without any prompting or fine-tuning.
papers.abstractCN: 在大语言模型中启用思维链(CoT)推理通常需要手动编写CoT提示。我们引入了一种简单的解码策略，无需任何提示或微调即可从预训练LLM中引出CoT推理。

papers.title: Leave No Context Behind: Efficient Infinite Context Transformers with Infini-attention
papers.titleCN: 不遗漏任何上下文：基于Infini-attention的高效无限上下文Transformer
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Infini-attention, an efficient attention mechanism designed to handle infinitely long contexts with bounded memory and computation. We demonstrate that models equipped with Infini-attention can effectively handle context windows of millions of tokens.
papers.abstractCN: 本文介绍了Infini-attention，一种高效的注意力机制，旨在以有限的内存和计算资源处理无限长的上下文。我们证明，配备Infini-attention的模型可以有效处理数百万token的上下文窗口。

papers.title: DeepSeek-V3 Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present DeepSeek-V3, a strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 671B total parameters with 37B activated for each token. DeepSeek-V3 pioneers an auxiliary-loss-free strategy for load balancing and sets a multi-token prediction training objective.
papers.abstractCN: 我们介绍了DeepSeek-V3，一个强大的混合专家(MoE)语言模型，总参数6710亿，每个token激活370亿参数。DeepSeek-V3开创了无辅助损失的负载均衡策略，并设置了多token预测训练目标。

papers.title: Qwen2.5 Technical Report
papers.titleCN: 通义千问2.5 技术报告
papers.abstract: We introduce Qwen2.5, pretrained on up to 18 trillion tokens, supporting context lengths of up to 128K tokens. The model series includes sizes from 0.5B to 72B parameters, catering to diverse deployment scenarios.
papers.abstractCN: 我们介绍了Qwen2.5，在多达18万亿token上进行预训练，支持长达12.8万token的上下文。该模型系列包括从0.5B到72B参数的多种规模，满足各种部署场景。

papers.title: Large Language Models Can Self-Improve
papers.titleCN: 大语言模型可以自我改进
papers.abstract: We demonstrate that LLMs can self-improve through a bootstrapping process where the model generates its own training data. By iteratively generating rationales and fine-tuning, the model achieves significant improvements without additional human supervision.
papers.abstractCN: 我们证明LLM可以通过引导过程自我改进，模型在此过程中生成自己的训练数据。通过迭代生成推理依据和微调，模型实现了显著改进，无需任何额外的人工监督。

papers.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
papers.titleCN: 宪法AI：来自AI反馈的无害性
papers.abstract: We experiment with methods for training a harmless AI assistant through self-improvement, without any human labels identifying harmful outputs. The only human oversight is provided through a list of rules or principles.
papers.abstractCN: 我们尝试通过自我改进来训练一个无害的AI助手，无需任何标识有害输出的人工标签。唯一的人工监督是通过一系列规则或原则提供的。

papers.title: Gemini 1.5: Unlocking Multimodal Understanding Across Millions of Tokens of Context
papers.titleCN: Gemini 1.5：解锁跨数百万Token上下文的多模态理解
papers.abstract: We present Gemini 1.5 Pro, capable of recalling and reasoning over fine-grained information from up to at least 10 million tokens. We observe near-perfect recall (>99%) on the needle in a haystack retrieval task up to 1M tokens.
papers.abstractCN: 我们介绍了Gemini 1.5 Pro，能够回忆和推理来自多达至少1000万token的细粒度信息。我们在高达100万token的「大海捞针」检索任务上观察到近乎完美的召回率(>99%)。

papers.title: Sora: A Review on Background, Technology, Limitations, and Opportunities of Large Vision Models
papers.titleCN: Sora：大型视觉模型背景、技术、局限与机遇综述
papers.abstract: OpenAI released Sora, a text-to-video generation model capable of generating high-quality videos up to 60 seconds. We trace the development history and analyze the technical architecture behind Sora.
papers.abstractCN: OpenAI发布了Sora，一个能够生成长达60秒高质量视频的文本到视频生成模型。我们追溯了发展历史并分析了Sora背后的技术架构。
